nasb.text: So the king said to me, “Why is your face sad though you are not sick? This is nothing but sadness of heart.” Then I was very much afraid.

esv.text: And the king said to me, “Why is your face sad, seeing you are not sick? This is nothing but sadness of the heart.” Then I was very much afraid.

cnv.text: 王卻問我：“你既然沒有病，為甚麼面帶愁容呢？這沒有別的可能，必是心中愁煩。”我就非常懼怕，

ccb.text: 王问我：“你没有病，为什么面带愁容？一定是心中烦恼。”我非常害怕。
